description: Museo Reina Sofía golden search cases (11): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the Reina Sofía rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-06 against the 1,208-row on-view set (room page-data enumeration → 100% room fill by construction). Spanish (+some Catalan/French) source titles preserved in `title`; DeepSeek es→en fills `titleAlt` for the contentless-FTS English index. 5 Spanish-query cases + 4 English-for-Spanish titleAlt cases (asserting expectObjectIDs, since search results return the source-language title) + 2 artist cases. License is CC BY-NC-ND: we ship short factual fields only (title/artist/date/room), no descriptions/images.

cases.note: ES; the museum's icon (room 205.10) — also many preparatory-drawing rows carry the word
ES typed without the tilde — unicode61 diacritic folding (Miró 'Danseuse espagnole / Bailarina española')
EN-for-ES via titleAlt ('Autorretrato cubista' → 'Cubist Self-Portrait'); result title stays Spanish, so assert the id
EN-for-ES via titleAlt ('Cabeza de caballo … para Guernica')
EN-for-ES via titleAlt ('19 julio 1936'); date-title normalization
artist surname typed without the accent
artist surname typed without the accent
